ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL, 2XL, 3XL) */,
  "size_system" TEXT /* Sizing system (e.g., U.S., European, Asian) */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Bust measurement range for the size */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement range for the size */,
  "hips" TEXT /* Hips measurement range for the size */,
  "length" TEXT /* Length measurement for the size */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement for the size */,
  "shoulder_width" TEXT /* Shoulder width measurement for the size */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the size (e.g., Tops, Bottoms, Dresses) */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Type of fit (e.g., Regular, Slim, Loose) */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of size (e.g., Standard, Plus, Petite) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion */,
  "source_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size in the source sizing system */,
  "target_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size in the target sizing system */,
  "conversion_ratio" REAL /* Conversion ratio between the two sizes */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the size (e.g., Tops, Bottoms, Dresses) */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Type of fit (e.g., Regular, Slim, Loose) */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of size (e.g., Standard, Plus, Petite) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_target_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_source_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., Tops, Bottoms, Dresses) */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size the product is available in */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product (e.g., Cotton, Polyester) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size of the product */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level for the product size */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store or warehouse where the inventory is located */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the stock level was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Bust measurement of the customer */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement of the customer */,
  "hips" TEXT /* Hips measurement of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the customer */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the customer */,
  "preferred_brand" TEXT /* Favorite brand of the customer */,
  "preferred_category" TEXT /* Favorite category of the customer (e.g., Tops, Bottoms, Dresses) */,
  "preferred_fit_type" TEXT /* Favorite fit type (e.g., Regular, Slim, Loose) */,
  "preferred_size_type" TEXT /* Favorite size type (e.g., Standard, Plus, Petite) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the purchase */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product purchased */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size of the product purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the purchase was made */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product purchased */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the purchase */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size of the product sold */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date when the sale occurred */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store or warehouse where the sale occurred */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated from the sale */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sales_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer receiving the recommendation */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the recommendation is for */,
  "recommended_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended size for the customer */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the recommendation */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_recommended_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)
